description: Shared project settings. RTK (Rust Token Killer) PreToolUse hook compresses noisy shell output (pytest/ruff/git/docker/...) before it reaches the agent context. Scoped by an allowlist in .claude/hooks/rtk-bash.sh; skips `uv run` and file reads. Requires `rtk` on PATH (winget install rtk-ai.rtk); no-ops silently if absent.
